issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The documentation contains verbose explanatory text beyond necessary instructions.
The skill is vendor-locked to Blender and cannot run on other AI agents.

scenarios.name: armature-ik-reach
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets all rubric requirements, while Response B uses a cube instead of an Empty target and omits the frame 50 keyframe.

scenarios.name: facial-expression-driver
scenarios.rationale: Response B creates the mesh and shape keys (though misnamed) and adds a driver, whereas Response A fails to create a mesh and also misnames the shape key and omits keyframing.
